mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_run_step ( task_id, run_id, step_index, status, metadata, started_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{runId}, #{stepIndex}, #{status}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{startedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (run_id, step_index) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, started_at = EXCLUDED.started_at, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata

INSERT INTO agent_tool_call ( task_id, run_id, step_index, tool_call_id, tool_name, arguments_json, status, argument_char_count, argument_token_estimate, redaction_policy_version, metadata, started_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{runId}, #{stepIndex}, #{toolCallId}, #{toolName}, #{argumentsJson,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{argumentCharCount}, #{argumentTokenEstimate}, #{redactionPolicyVersion}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{startedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (run_id, step_index, tool_call_id) DO UPDATE SET tool_name = EXCLUDED.tool_name, arguments_json = EXCLUDED.arguments_json, status = EXCLUDED.status, argument_char_count = EXCLUDED.argument_char_count, argument_token_estimate = EXCLUDED.argument_token_estimate, redaction_policy_version = EXCLUDED.redaction_policy_version, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata, started_at = EXCLUDED.started_at
